title: The Crew Faces the Heat
description: On pages 17–20, this part focuses on the crew faces the heat, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Crew Faces the Heat. Vivi and the Straw Hats decide that stopping the war means confronting Crocodile directly instead of chasing the rebels blindly. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: With the King's mind set on forbidding even the mere idea of an offensive,

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: All we can do is wait and suppress whatever revolt that keeps popping up...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And we're already at our limits,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Just trying to keep our own soldiers in-line...

dialogue.speaker: Pell
dialogue.text: Vice-Commander of the Alabama Royal Guards "Pell the Falcon"

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: If only Igaram could be here in this crucial time to help us...

dialogue.speaker: Pell
dialogue.text: Enough with that talk, Pell...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I shall bring light to the Kingdom.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: -Igaram-

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: That man would never betray his kingdom...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: He must have left with some sort of plan.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The same goes for Princess Vivi...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: He could've at least told us about it before leaving...!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Or is that all a part of his plan too...!?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: ...Yes, it must be so.

dialogue.speaker: Chaka
dialogue.text: command- ERS chaka and yell!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Carue has just returned to the Palace!

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: Your majesty, this letter...!

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: Yes...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's Vivi's handwriting without a doubt...!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Then that means...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yes, it came as quite a shock to me too...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I naively thought he was on the same side as the World Govern- went and let my guard down... But to think Crocedile would be planning to take over the entire kingdom...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And Igaram...!?

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: He gave his life for Alabasta...

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: That's just the kind of man he was...!

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: It also said in the letter you fought bravely.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Well done, Carue.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Quick!

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: Is your left arm injured?

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: Here, let me have a look...

dialogue.speaker: Karoo
dialogue.text: Quack!

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: W-what?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Puck

dialogue.speaker: Chaka
dialogue.text: Chaka.

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: We've found our enemy at last.

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: Have the army prepare to move out at once!

summary: This part develops the crew faces the heat and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
